conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: I'm an undergraduate student, and I want to ask a professor if I can do some research with them in molecular biology. Please help me write them an email.
org_constraint: The tone of the email should be formal and professional.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "Hey there, hope you're doing awesome!"
instruction: I'm an undergraduate student, and I want to ask a professor if I can do some research with them in molecular biology. Please help me write them an email. The tone of the email should be formal and professional. The email must include the phrase "Hey there, hope you're doing awesome!"
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Research Opportunities in Molecular Biology – [Your Full Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

My name is [Your Full Name], and I am currently an undergraduate student at [Name of Your University], majoring in [Your Major]. I have been following your research on [mention a specific topic, paper, or lab project from their profile] with great interest, as it aligns closely with my academic goals and passion for molecular biology.

As an undergraduate aspiring to conduct independent research, I am writing to respectfully inquire if there might be any opportunities to join your laboratory for a thesis project or as a research assistant during the upcoming semester. I possess strong coursework in [mention relevant courses, e.g., genetics, biochemistry, cell biology] and have developed proficiency in [mention 1-2 relevant technical skills, e.g., PCR, gel electrophoresis, data analysis]. I am eager to contribute to your team while developing practical research skills under your supervision.

**Hey there, hope you're doing awesome!** While I understand that your schedule may be very busy, I would greatly appreciate it if you could let me know if you are currently accepting new students or if you might recommend someone else in your network who is looking for similar experiences.

I have attached my resume and transcript for your review. Thank you very much for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]  
[Your Student ID Number]  
[Your Phone Number]  
[Link to LinkedIn Profile or Personal Website (optional)]<|im_end|>
